Bash(timeout 120 bash -c './djia-production-run.sh 2>&1 <<EOF
!set outputformat csv
SELECT * FROM read_parquet(''''s3://govdata-parquet/source=census/type=decennial/year=2020/decennial_population.parquet'''') LIMIT 5;
!quit
EOF
')

Bash(python3 -c "
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
table = pq.read_table(''/tmp/decennial_population.parquet'')
print(f''Rows: {table.num_rows}'')
print(f''Columns: {table.num_columns}'')
print(f''Schema: {table.schema}'')
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
table = pq.read_table(''/tmp/population_estimates.parquet'')
print(f''Rows: {table.num_rows}'')
print(f''Columns: {table.num_columns}'')
print(f''Schema:'')
for field in table.schema:
    print(f''  {field.name}: {field.type}'')
")

Bash(timeout 120 bash -c './djia-production-run.sh 2>&1 <<EOF
!set outputformat csv
SELECT COUNT(*) as row_count FROM census.population_estimates;
SELECT geoid, population_estimate, state_fips FROM census.population_estimates LIMIT 5;
!quit
EOF
')

Bash(timeout 120 bash -c './djia-production-run.sh 2>&1 <<EOF
!set outputformat csv
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM census.population_estimates;
!quit
EOF
')

Bash(timeout 120 bash -c './djia-production-run.sh 2>&1 <<EOF
!set outputformat csv
SELECT geoid, population_estimate, state_fips FROM census.population_estimates WHERE year = 2020 LIMIT 5;
!quit
EOF
')

Bash(timeout 120 bash -c './djia-production-run.sh <<EOF 2>/dev/null
!set outputformat csv
SELECT geoid, population_estimate, state_fips FROM census.population_estimates WHERE year = 2020 LIMIT 5;
!quit
EOF
')

Bash(git commit -m "feat(core): enhance SQLException logging in ResultSetEnumerable

Add detailed error logging when SQLException occurs during JDBC query execution.
Now logs SQL query, error code, SQL state, and full stack trace to aid debugging.

This helps diagnose issues with JDBC sub-schemas (including DuckDB) by providing
complete context about failed queries instead of just the exception message.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "refactor(govdata): simplify cache directory handling with StorageProvider

Remove unnecessary File object conversions since StorageProvider handles both
local filesystem and S3 paths uniformly via string paths.

Changes:
- CensusSchemaFactory: Use cacheDir string directly instead of converting to
  File object (localCacheDir) for parquet conversion methods
- CensusDataTransformer: Update method signatures to accept String paths
- CensusApiClient: Update convertToParquet to use String paths
- ConversionMetadata: Support both File and String path parameters

This simplifies the code and makes S3 path handling more consistent across
the govdata adapter, leveraging StorageProvider''s abstraction.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")
